name: AI Addendum
description: An addendum governing the use of AI services, covering AI-generated content, intellectual property rights, disclaimers, and definitions related to AI features within a broader service agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the relationship between a covered entity and a business associate that handles protected health information (PHI), covering permitted uses, safeguards, and breach notification obligations.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A comprehensive agreement for cloud-hosted software services, covering access and use rights, restrictions, privacy, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability limitations, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A GDPR and UK GDPR compliant agreement governing how a data processor handles personal data on behalf of a data controller, including processing purposes, security measures, sub-processors, and data subject rights.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for early-stage design partnerships where a customer provides feedback and participates in product development in exchange for early access and discounted or free use of the provider's product.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A bilateral confidentiality agreement for protecting sensitive information shared between two parties during business discussions, covering permitted disclosures, exclusions, and obligations upon termination.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: A cover page template for the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, providing fillable fields for party details, effective date, permitted purpose, and governing law.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: An agreement governing a reseller or referral partnership, covering appointment and scope of the partnership, fees and commissions, restrictions, intellectual property, term and termination, and related obligations.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term trial agreement allowing a customer to evaluate a provider's product for a limited period, typically at no charge, with defined scope, restrictions, and transition terms at the end of the pilot.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: An agreement governing the delivery of professional or consulting services, covering statements of work, fees, intellectual property ownership of deliverables, warranties, and liability.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: An agreement defining the service quality commitments for a cloud service, including uptime targets, incident response times, remedies such as service credits, and related definitions.

name: Software License Agreement
description: An agreement for on-premise or self-hosted software licensing, covering the license grant, restrictions, updates, payment, warranties, liability limitations, indemnification, and confidentiality.
